title: Surgeon Vacancy at Indraprastha Apollo Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Indraprastha Apollo Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Indraprastha Apollo Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Indraprastha Apollo Capital India:
Indraprastha Apollo Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo Capital India!
